objective: System restart recovery. Machine rebooted — restart all required backend services: Ollama, site_kb_server.py (Flask RAG on :8091), and ngrok tunnel. Confirm each is healthy before completing.
required_validation: Confirm Ollama is running (curl http://127.0.0.1:11434/ returns response)
Confirm site_kb_server.py is running on :8091 (curl http://127.0.0.1:8091/health returns HTTP 200 with documents count)
Confirm ngrok tunnel is active and public URL is obtained
Report the live ngrok public URL so Main can update the chat endpoint
If any service fails to start, report exact error output
execution_instructions: Start with cd ~/mide-pilot && git pull --ff-only origin main
Step 1 — Ollama: check 'curl -s http://127.0.0.1:11434/' — if no response, run 'ollama serve &' and wait ~5s then recheck

Step 2 — Flask RAG: check 'curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8091/health' — if no response, run 'nohup python3 ~/Documents/itheia-llm/site_kb_server.py > ~/Documents/itheia-llm/site_kb.log 2>&1 &' and wait ~5s then recheck

Step 3 — ngrok: check 'curl -s http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels' — if no tunnels, start ngrok with 'nohup ngrok http 8091 > ~/ngrok.log 2>&1 &', wait ~5s, then query http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels and extract the public_url
git add, git commit -m 'worker: TASK-0011 result — backend services restored', git push
